design_philosophy: Objective, rigid, and functional. High-contrast control room aesthetic. Data density is prioritized over decorative elements. Borders are sharp (1px solid), padding is mathematical, and color is used exclusively to signal action or state changes.

fonts.usage: Headings, primary metrics, high-level structural text.
Body text, chat bubbles, UI labels.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Control Room Grid (Mode B). grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-px bg-[#222222] to create 1px grid lines between columns.

columns.left_panel: col-span-1 lg:col-span-3 (Document Management). Dense lists, tactile drag-drop area.
columns.center_panel: col-span-1 lg:col-span-6 (Streaming Chat). Maximum focus, comfortable reading width.
columns.right_panel: col-span-1 lg:col-span-3 (Sources & Citations). Stacked cards, metadata focus.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Strict Tailwind scale. Internal padding in panels MUST be p-6 or p-8.
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). Minimal border-radius (rounded-none or rounded-sm max). 1px solid borders border-border. No drop shadows, use solid black offset shadows if elevation is necessary.

drag_and_drop_upload.style: border-dashed border-2 border-[#333333] hover:border-[#FF3B30] bg-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#141414] transition-all duration-200. Text is centered, minimal icon.
drag_and_drop_upload.states: Active upload shows progress bar with sharp, neon-bright fill (e.g., #FFFFFF or #FF3B30).

chat_interface.user_bubble: bg-[#1A1A1A] text-white p-4 rounded-sm border border-[#333333] ml-auto max-w-[85%]
chat_interface.ai_bubble: bg-transparent text-white p-4 max-w-[100%] border-l-2 border-[#FF3B30] pl-6
chat_interface.markdown: Prose dark styling. Inline code blocks must use IBM Plex Mono with bg-[#1A1A1A] px-1.5 py-0.5. Blockquotes use left border.
chat_interface.typing_indicator: Minimal ASCII-style blinking cursor (█) or 3 fading dots.

citations_panel.card_style: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#222222] p-4 flex flex-col gap-2 rounded-sm
citations_panel.highlight_state: When a source is referenced in chat, the corresponding citation card border turns to #FF3B30 and text turns pure white.
citations_panel.metadata: Use overline typography (uppercase, tracked out, IBM Plex Mono) for document types (PDF, DOCX) and page numbers.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-6 py-3 rounded-none hover:bg-[#FF3B30] hover:text-white transition-colors duration-200
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white border border-[#333333] hover:border-white px-4 py-2 rounded-none transition-colors duration-200

inputs.chat_input: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#333333] focus:border-white text-white p-4 w-full rounded-sm outline-none transition-colors ring-0

animation_and_motion.transitions: Fast and snappy. transition-all duration-150 ease-out.
animation_and_motion.hover_states: High contrast shifts. Borders go from dark gray to pure white or signal orange. Backgrounds shift slightly lighter.
animation_and_motion.streaming: Text appears seamlessly. Animate citation cards sliding in from the right when generated.

icons_and_assets.style: Duotone or Regular weight. Must match the exact text color of their container.

avatar_placeholder.description: Bold geometric black and white pattern for abstract avatar/system identity.

empty_state_background.description: Ethereal fiber optic strands. Apply heavy opacity overlay (e.g. 10%) so it doesn't distract from data.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets at least 4.5:1 against #000000. Muted text must not drop below #666666.
accessibility_and_testing.focus: All interactive elements must have focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF3B30] focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-black.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme colors defined. Never use default Tailwind blue or purple.
Use Phosphor icons for all iconography. Avoid mixing icon libraries.
The layout must be a strict 3-column bento-style grid on desktop (12 columns split 3-6-3). On mobile, stack them: Chat first, then Docs, then Citations.
Include data-testid attributes on all interactive elements as specified.
Ensure the Chat area supports Markdown rendering (react-markdown) and syntax highlighting.
Do NOT use glassmorphism (backdrop-blur) anywhere in the main layout. Use solid black/gray colors with 1px borders for the technical Swiss aesthetic.
In Tailwind config, map the provided colors to custom variables or directly extend the theme.
